name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES procState, turn

Init ==
  /\ procState \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
  /\ turn \in 1..N

Next ==
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ procState[i] = "idle"
                      /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
                      /\ turn' = turn
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ procState[i] = "trying"
                      /\ turn = i
                      /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
                      /\ turn' = turn
  \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ procState[i] = "critical"
                      /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
                      /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<procState, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS FiniteSet

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK == 
  /\ participants \in FiniteSet
  /\ coordinator \in FiniteSet
  /\ messages \in FiniteSet
  /\ \A p \in participants: 
        /\ p \in FiniteSet
        /\ p \in messages

Init == 
  /\ participants \in FiniteSet
  /\ coordinator \in FiniteSet
  /\ messages \in FiniteSet

Next == 
  /\ participants \in FiniteSet
  /\ coordinator \in FiniteSet
  /\ messages \in FiniteSet

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a function from 1..N to 0..N indicating which philosopher owns each fork.
   0 means the fork is free. *)
Forks == [f \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Philosopher states: a function from 1..N to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
States == [p \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper functions *)
LeftFork(p) == IF p = 1 THEN N ELSE p - 1
RightFork(p) == IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1

(* Type checking *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A p \in 1..N : forks[p] \in 0..N
          /\ \A p \in 1..N : states[p] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state: all forks free, all philosophers thinking *)
Init == forks = Forks /\ states = States

(* Transition: philosopher p becomes hungry *)
Hungry(p) == /\ states[p] = "thinking"
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
           /\ forks' = forks

(* Transition: philosopher p picks up both forks and starts eating *)
Eat(p) == /\ states[p] = "hungry"
           /\ forks[LeftFork(p)] = 0
           /\ forks[RightFork(p)] = 0
           /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = p, ![RightFork(p)] = p]
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]

(* Transition: philosopher p puts down both forks and starts thinking *)
Think(p) == /\ states[p] = "eating"
           /\ forks[LeftFork(p)] = p
           /\ forks[RightFork(p)] = p
           /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(p)] = 0, ![RightFork(p)] = 0]
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry, eat if possible, or think *)
Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          (Hungry(p) \/ Eat(p) \/ Think(p))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(Seq(1..N))]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 1
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ count' = count + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 0
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ count' = count - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"

        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"

        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> == ==

---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets


Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"

        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"

        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> == ==
